name: Mouse Mouse, Climb the House
author: Poki
description: Mouse Mouse: Climb the House is a fast-paced, multiplayer obstacle game where you and your friends step into the tiny paws of mischievous mouse on a quest for the ultimate cheese! In this thrilling adventure, you'll scamper up shelves, leap across furniture, climb into the fridge, launch from a toaster and dodge traps in a lively house filled with challenges and surprises. As you navigate through the house, you’ll face increasingly elaborate traps set by the frantic homeowner who’s determined to protect their precious cheese. Each level brings new obstacles and clever defenses that test your agility. Every mouse you see is another player. Join the fun, and let the cheese chase begin! How to play Mouse Mouse, Climb the House? Move: WASD or the arrow keys Jump: the space bar Camera: use your mouse to look around Who created Mouse Mouse, Climb the House? Mouse Mouse, Climb the House is created by Pelican Party Studios. Play their other game on Poki: Narrow.One , Ducklings.io , Nugget Royale , Stack City and Double Dodgers ! How can I play Mouse Mouse, Climb the House for free? You can play Mouse Mouse, Climb the House for free on Poki. Can I play Mouse Mouse, Climb the House on mobile devices and desktop? Mouse Mouse, Climb the House can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
